description: Closing end-banner (pre-FAQ / #conclusion) color treatments. Pick one per build — never reuse the same look on every page. Sources: Reference-Site + webtemplate live sections.

selection.notes: Deterministic rotate via page slug so each build gets a stable but varied type. Agency landings may prefer EB-01; dark BI may prefer EB-03/EB-05.

types.name: soft-texture
types.label: Soft textured band

types.name: dark-teal
types.label: Dark teal gradient band
types.html_note: Wrap closing content in .banner-gradient > .pre-banner OR style #conclusion with dark gradient + light text

types.name: soft-theme-wash
types.label: Soft theme color wash (no texture asset)
types.notes: Use page --color-primary / --color-secondary in soft radials on a light base. Must NOT equal hero fingerprint. No blue-shadow texture required.

types.name: dark-violet
types.label: Dark violet → navy closing

types.name: warm-pastel
types.label: Warm pastel diagonal (comparison light)

types.name: soft-mint
types.label: Soft mint / cool green wash

types.name: cool-lilac
types.label: Cool lilac / periwinkle wash
